SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MCGILL. PLAINTIFF BRONTE KINCAID SCHMIT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN STENZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA LEGITTIMO IS PRESENT, WITH WITNESS JEREMY PORTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY SCHMIT, BRONTE KINCAID STENZ, JONATHAN RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEGITTIMO, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHMIT, BRONTE KINCAID STENZ, JONATHAN RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGITTIMO, LAURA $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,440.00, SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEGITTIMO, LAURA
